SRM Institute Admission Test.official_note: SRMJEEE is SRMIST's own test; srmist.edu.in is the official domain. SRM does not publish a static cutoff table - results/counselling/admission are handled via srmist.edu.in and the application portal applications.srmist.edu.in. Admission page returned HTTP 403 to the fetcher (bot-block) but is the correct official domain.

SRM Joint Engineering Entrance Examinati.official_note: Same as SRMJEEE - SRMIST's own engineering entrance test. Official domain srmist.edu.in; no static cutoff page published (results/counselling via portal). Admission page 403'd the fetcher (bot-block) but is correct official domain.

School of Fashion Technology Entrance Te.official_note: Official MKSSS School of Fashion Technology (SOFT Pune) site. The prior /admission/ path now 404s. Per official process merit list/results for SOFT CET are published on the institute's admission portal, not on a static cutoff page. Homepage verified live; no dedicated cutoff URL exists.

Sharda University Admission Test.official_note: Official SUAT (Sharda University Online Admission Test) site, verified live. Navigation covers About/Test Process/Fee/Apply; no separate cutoff or merit-list page is published (SUAT has no public closing-rank table). More specific than the generic sharda.ac.in/admissions/suat link.

Sharda University Admission Test Enginee.official_note: Same SUAT exam (engineering programmes admitted via SUAT). Official suat.sharda.ac.in verified live; no dedicated cutoff/merit page published officially.

Symbiosis Entrance Test.official_note: Official Symbiosis Entrance Test (SET) site, verified live. Results announced on set-test.org; category-wise cutoffs/merit & wait lists are published on each Symbiosis institute's own site after results, not as one static cutoff page on set-test.org.

Symbiosis Institute Of Media Entrance.official_note: Official SIMC Pune admissions page, verified live - publishes merit lists (MBA-CM 1st/2nd merit list, GE-PI shortlist links) and program selection criteria/eligibility. This is the authoritative cutoff/merit page; SIMC admits via SNAP/SET plus institute process.
